title: Training deck for an internal enablement rollout
prompt: Create an 8-slide training deck for account managers adopting a new AI-assisted account planning workflow. Focus on what changes, what stays human-owned, common mistakes, and a simple rollout checklist.
targetAudience: Account managers and regional team leads
acceptanceNotes: The deck should feel like a training asset, not a strategy memo.
It should include concrete workflow guidance and mistakes to avoid.
It should remain accessible to a mixed-confidence audience.
